verses.latin_vulgate: Congregatus est igitur omnis Israël ad David in Hebron, dicens : Os tuum sumus, et caro tua.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּקָּבְצ֧וּ כׇֽל־יִשְׂרָאֵ֛ל אֶל־דָּוִ֖יד חֶבְר֣וֹנָה לֵאמֹ֑ר הִנֵּ֛ה עַצְמְךָ֥ וּֽבְשָׂרְךָ֖ אֲנָֽחְנוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Then all Israel gathered themselves to David in Hebron, saying: We are thy bone, and thy flesh.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja koko Israel kokoontui Davidin tykö Hebroniin ja sanoi: katso, me olemme sinun luus ja lihas.
verses.king_james: Then all Israel gathered themselves to David unto Hebron, saying, Behold, we are thy bone and thy flesh.

verses.latin_vulgate: Heri quoque et nudiustertius cum adhuc regnaret Saul, tu eras qui educebas et introducebas Israël : tibi enim dixit Dominus Deus tuus : Tu pasces populum meum Israël, et tu eris princeps super eum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: גַּם־תְּמ֣וֹל גַּם־שִׁלְשׁ֗וֹם גַּ֚ם בִּֽהְי֣וֹת שָׁא֣וּל מֶ֔לֶךְ אַתָּ֛ה הַמּוֹצִ֥יא וְהַמֵּבִ֖יא אֶת־יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל וַיֹּ֩אמֶר֩ יְהֹוָ֨ה אֱלֹהֶ֜יךָ לְךָ֗ אַתָּ֨ה תִרְעֶ֤ה אֶת־עַמִּי֙ אֶת־יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל וְאַתָּה֙ תִּֽהְיֶ֣ה נָגִ֔יד עַ֖ל עַמִּ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: Yesterday also, and the day before when Saul was king, thou wast he that leddest out and broughtest in Israel: for the Lord thy God said to thee: Thou shalt feed my people Israel, and thou shalt be ruler over them.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja aina ennenkin, Saulin ollessa kuninkaana, johdatit sinä Israelin ulos ja sisälle. Ja Herra sinun Jumalas on sanonut sinulle: sinun pitää kaitseman kansaani Israelia ja sinun pitää oleman kansani Israelin päämiehen.
verses.king_james: And moreover in time past, even when Saul was king, thou wast he that leddest out and broughtest in Israel: and the Lord thy God said unto thee, Thou shalt feed my people Israel, and thou shalt be ruler over my people Israel.

verses.latin_vulgate: Venerunt ergo omnes majores natu Israël ad regem in Hebron, et iniit David cum eis fœdus coram Domino : unxeruntque eum regem super Israël, juxta sermonem Domini quem locutus est in manu Samuel.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַ֠יָּבֹ֠אוּ כׇּל־זִקְנֵ֨י יִשְׂרָאֵ֤ל אֶל־הַמֶּ֙לֶךְ֙ חֶבְר֔וֹנָה וַיִּכְרֹת֩ לָהֶ֨ם דָּוִ֥יד בְּרִ֛ית בְּחֶבְר֖וֹן לִפְנֵ֣י יְהֹוָ֑ה וַיִּמְשְׁח֨וּ אֶת־דָּוִ֤יד לְמֶ֙לֶךְ֙ עַל־יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל כִּדְבַ֥ר יְהֹוָ֖ה בְּיַד־שְׁמוּאֵֽל׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: So all the ancients of Israel came to the king to Hebron, and David made a covenant with them before the Lord: and they anointed him king over Israel according to the word of the Lord which he spoke in the hand of Samuel.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kaikki Israelin vanhimmat tulivat kuninkaan tykö Hebroniin, ja David teki liiton heidän kanssansa Herran edessä Hebronissa. Ja he voitelivat Davidin Israelin kuninkaaksi Herran sanan jälkeen Samuelin kautta.
verses.king_james: Therefore came all the elders of Israel to the king to Hebron; and David made a covenant with them in Hebron before the Lord; and they anointed David king over Israel, according to the word of the Lord by Samuel.

verses.latin_vulgate: Abiit quoque David et omnis Israël in Jerusalem : hæc est Jebus, ubi erant Jebusæi habitatores terræ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֵּ֨לֶךְ דָּוִ֧יד וְכׇל־יִשְׂרָאֵ֛ל יְרוּשָׁלַ֖͏ִם הִ֣יא יְב֑וּס וְשָׁם֙ הַיְבוּסִ֔י יֹשְׁבֵ֖י הָאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And David and all Israel went to Jerusalem, which is Jebus, where the Jebusites were the inhabitants of the land.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sitten meni David ja koko Israel Jerusalemiin, se on Jebus; sillä Jebusilaiset asuivat siinä maassa.
verses.king_james: And David and all Israel went to Jerusalem, which is Jebus; where the Jebusites were, the inhabitants of the land.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dixeruntque qui habitabant in Jebus ad David : Non ingredieris huc. Porro David cepit arcem Sion, quæ est civitas David,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֨אמְר֜וּ יֹשְׁבֵ֤י יְבוּס֙ לְדָוִ֔יד לֹ֥א תָב֖וֹא הֵ֑נָּה וַיִּלְכֹּ֤ד דָּוִיד֙ אֶת־מְצֻדַ֣ת צִיּ֔וֹן הִ֖יא עִ֥יר דָּוִֽיד׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the inhabitants of Jebus said to David: Thou shalt not come in here. But David took the castle of Sion, which is the city of David.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Jebuksen asuvaiset sanoivat Davidille: sinun ei pidä tuleman tänne; mutta David voitti Zionin linnan, se on Davidin kaupunki.
verses.king_james: And the inhabitants of Jebus said to David, Thou shalt not come hither. Nevertheless David took the castle of Zion, which is the city of David.

verses.latin_vulgate: dixitque : Omnis qui percusserit Jebusæum in primis, erit princeps et dux. Ascendit igitur primus Joab filius Sarviæ, et factus est princeps.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֣אמֶר דָּוִ֔יד כׇּל־מַכֵּ֤ה יְבוּסִי֙ בָּרִ֣אשׁוֹנָ֔ה יִהְיֶ֥ה לְרֹ֖אשׁ וּלְשָׂ֑ר וַיַּ֧עַל בָּרִאשׁוֹנָ֛ה יוֹאָ֥ב בֶּן־צְרוּיָ֖ה וַיְהִ֥י לְרֹֽאשׁ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he said: Whosoever shall first strike the Jebusites, shall be the head and chief captain. And Joab the son of Sarvia went up first, and was made the general.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja David sanoi: joka Jebusilaiset ensin lyö, hänen pitää oleman pään ja ylimmäisen. Niin Joab Zerujan poika astui ensin ylös ja tuli päämieheksi.
verses.king_james: And David said, Whosoever smiteth the Jebusites first shall be chief and captain. So Joab the son of Zeruiah went first up, and was chief.

verses.latin_vulgate: Habitavit autem David in arce, et idcirco appellata est civitas David.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֵּ֥שֶׁב דָּוִ֖יד בַּמְצָ֑ד עַל־כֵּ֥ן קָרְאוּ־ל֖וֹ עִ֥יר דָּוִֽיד׃
verses.douay_rheims: And David dwelt in the castle, and therefore it was called the city of David,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja David asui linnassa; sentähden kutsuivat he sen Davidin kaupungiksi.
verses.king_james: And David dwelt in the castle; therefore they called it the city of David.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ædificavitque urbem in circuitu a Mello usque ad gyrum ; Joab autem reliqua urbis exstruxit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּ֤בֶן הָעִיר֙ מִסָּבִ֔יב מִן־הַמִּלּ֖וֹא וְעַד־הַסָּבִ֑יב וְיוֹאָ֕ב יְחַיֶּ֖ה אֶת־שְׁאָ֥ר הָעִֽיר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he built the city round about from Mello all round, and Joab built the rest of the city.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän rakensi kaupungin ympäri Millosta ja sitte kaiken ympäri. Ja Joab jätti ne elämään, jotka jääneet olivat kaupunkiin.
verses.king_james: And he built the city round about, even from Millo round about: and Joab repaired the rest of the city.

verses.latin_vulgate: Proficiebatque David vadens et crescens, et Dominus exercituum erat cum eo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֵּ֥לֶךְ דָּוִ֖יד הָל֣וֹךְ וְגָד֑וֹל וַיהֹוָ֥ה צְבָא֖וֹת עִמּֽוֹ׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And David went on growing and increasing, and the Lord of hosts was with him.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja niin David menestyi ja tuli väkeväksi, ja Herra Zebaot oli hänen kanssansa.
verses.king_james: So David waxed greater and greater: for the Lord of hosts was with him.

verses.latin_vulgate: Hi principes virorum fortium David, qui adjuverunt eum ut rex fieret super omnem Israël, juxta verbum Domini quod locutus est ad Israël.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֵ֨לֶּה רָאשֵׁ֤י הַגִּבֹּרִים֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר לְדָוִ֔יד הַמִּתְחַזְּקִ֨ים עִמּ֧וֹ בְמַלְכוּת֛וֹ עִם־כׇּל־יִשְׂרָאֵ֖ל לְהַמְלִיכ֑וֹ כִּדְבַ֥ר יְהֹוָ֖ה עַל־יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: These are the chief of the valiant man of David, who helped him to be made king over all Israel, according to the word of the Lord, which he spoke to Israel.
verses.finnish_biblia: Nämät ovat ylimmäiset Davidin väkevimpäin seassa, jotka miehuullisesti hänen kanssansa pitivät hänen valtakunnassansa koko Israelin tykönä, niin että hän tehtiin kuninkaaksi Herran sanan jälkeen Israelin ylitse.
verses.king_james: These also are the chief of the mighty men whom David had, who strengthened themselves with him in his kingdom, and with all Israel, to make him king, according to the word of the Lord concerning Israel.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et iste numerus robustorum David : Jesbaam filius Hachamoni princeps inter triginta : iste levavit hastam suam super trecentos vulneratos una vice.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֵ֛לֶּה מִסְפַּ֥ר הַגִּבֹּרִ֖ים אֲשֶׁ֣ר לְדָוִ֑יד יָֽשׇׁבְעָ֣ם בֶּן־חַכְמוֹנִ֗י רֹ֚אשׁ (השלושים) [הַשָּׁ֣לִישִׁ֔ים] הֽוּא־עוֹרֵ֧ר אֶת־חֲנִית֛וֹ עַל־שְׁלֹשׁ־מֵא֥וֹת חָלָ֖ל בְּפַ֥עַם אֶחָֽת׃
verses.douay_rheims: And this is the number of the heroes of David: Jesbaam the son of Hachamoni the chief among the thirty: he lifted up his spear against three hundred wounded by him at one time.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja tämä on Davidin sankarien luku: Jasobeam Hakmonin poika ylimmäinen päämiesten seassa. Hän nosti keihäänsä ja löi kerralla kolmesataa.
verses.king_james: And this is the number of the mighty men whom David had; Jashobeam, an Hachmonite, the chief of the captains: he lifted up his spear against three hundred slain by him at one time.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et post eum Eleazar filius patrui ejus Ahohites, qui erat inter tres potentes.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאַחֲרָ֛יו אֶלְעָזָ֥ר בֶּן־דּוֹד֖וֹ הָאֲחוֹחִ֑י ה֖וּא בִּשְׁלוֹשָׁ֥ה הַגִּבֹּרִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: And after him was Eleazar his uncle's son the Ahohite, who was one of the three mighties.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hänen jälkeensä oli Eleasar, Dodon Ahohilaisen poika, hän oli kolmen sankarin seassa.
verses.king_james: And after him was Eleazar the son of Dodo, the Ahohite, who was one of the three mighties.

verses.latin_vulgate: Iste fuit cum David in Phesdomim, quando Philisthiim congregati sunt ad locum illum in prælium : et erat ager regionis illius plenus hordeo, fugeratque populus a facie Philisthinorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הֽוּא־הָיָ֨ה עִם־דָּוִ֜יד בַּפַּ֣ס דַּמִּ֗ים וְהַפְּלִשְׁתִּים֙ נֶאֶסְפוּ־שָׁ֣ם לַמִּלְחָמָ֔ה וַתְּהִ֛י חֶלְקַ֥ת הַשָּׂדֶ֖ה מְלֵאָ֣ה שְׂעוֹרִ֑ים וְהָעָ֥ם נָ֖סוּ מִפְּנֵ֥י פְלִשְׁתִּֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: He was with David in Phesdomim, when the Philistines were gathered to that place to battle: and the field of that country was full of barley, and the people fled from before the Philistines.
verses.finnish_biblia: Tämä oli Davidin kanssa Pasdammimissa, kuin Philistealaiset olivat kokoontuneet sinne sotaan. Ja oli kappale peltoa ohraa täynnä, ja kansa pakeni Philistealaisia.
verses.king_james: He was with David at Pas–dammim, and there the Philistines were gathered together to battle, where was a parcel of ground full of barley; and the people fled from before the Philistines.

verses.latin_vulgate: Hi steterunt in medio agri, et defenderunt eum : cumque percussissent Philisthæos, dedit Dominus salutem magnam populo suo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּֽתְיַצְּב֤וּ בְתוֹךְ־הַֽחֶלְקָה֙ וַיַּצִּיל֔וּהָ וַיַּכּ֖וּ אֶת־פְּלִשְׁתִּ֑ים וַיּ֥וֹשַׁע יְהֹוָ֖ה תְּשׁוּעָ֥ה גְדוֹלָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: But these men stood in the midst of the field, and defended it: and they slew the Philistines, and the Lord gave a great deliverance to his people.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja he astuivat keskelle peltoa, ja varjelivat sen, ja löivät Philistealaiset. Ja Herra antoi heille suuren autuuden.
verses.king_james: And they set themselves in the midst of that parcel, and delivered it, and slew the Philistines; and the Lord saved them by a great deliverance.

verses.latin_vulgate: Descenderunt autem tres de triginta principibus ad petram, in qua erat David, ad speluncam Odollam, quando Philisthiim fuerant castrametati in valle Raphaim.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֵּרְד֡וּ שְֽׁלוֹשָׁה֩ מִן־הַשְּׁלוֹשִׁ֨ים רֹ֤אשׁ עַל־הַצֻּר֙ אֶל־דָּוִ֔יד אֶל־מְעָרַ֖ת עֲדֻלָּ֑ם וּמַחֲנֵ֣ה פְלִשְׁתִּ֔ים חֹנָ֖ה בְּעֵ֥מֶק רְפָאִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: And three of the thirty captains went down to the rock, wherein David was, to the cave of Odollam, when the Philistines encamped in the valley of Raphaim.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kolme niistä kolmestakymmenestä ylimmäisestä tulivat kalliolle alas Davidin tykö Adullamin luolaan. Mutta Philistealaisten leiri oli Rephaimin laaksossa.
verses.king_james: Now three of the thirty captains went down to the rock to David, into the cave of Adullam; and the host of the Philistines encamped in the valley of Rephaim.

verses.latin_vulgate: Porro David erat in præsidio, et statio Philisthinorum in Bethlehem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְדָוִ֖יד אָ֣ז בַּמְּצוּדָ֑ה וּנְצִ֣יב פְּלִשְׁתִּ֔ים אָ֖ז בְּבֵ֥ית לָֽחֶם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And David was in a hold, and the garrison of the Philistines in Bethlehem.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja David oli silloin linnassa; ja Philistealaisten kansa oli silloin Betlehemissä.
verses.king_james: And David was then in the hold, and the Philistines’ garrison was then at Beth–lehem.

verses.latin_vulgate: Desideravit igitur David, et dixit : O si quis daret mihi aquam de cisterna Bethlehem, quæ est in porta !
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּתְאָ֥ו דָּוִ֖יד וַיֹּאמַ֑ר מִ֚י יַשְׁקֵ֣נִי מַ֔יִם מִבּ֥וֹר בֵּֽית־לֶ֖חֶם אֲשֶׁ֥ר בַּשָּֽׁעַר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And David longed, and said: O that some man would give me water of the cistern of Bethlehem, which is in the gate.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja David himoitsi ja sanoi: kuka antais minun juoda sitä vettä, joka on kaivossa Betlehemin portin tykönä?
verses.king_james: And David longed, and said, Oh that one would give me drink of the water of the well of Beth–lehem, that is at the gate!

verses.latin_vulgate: Tres ergo isti per media castra Philisthinorum perrexerunt, et hauserunt aquam de cisterna Bethlehem quæ erat in porta, et attulerunt ad David ut biberet. Qui noluit, sed magis libavit illam Domino,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּבְקְע֨וּ הַשְּׁלֹשָׁ֜ה בְּמַחֲנֵ֣ה פְלִשְׁתִּ֗ים וַיִּֽשְׁאֲבוּ־מַ֙יִם֙ מִבּ֤וֹר בֵּֽית־לֶ֙חֶם֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר בַּשַּׁ֔עַר וַיִּשְׂא֖וּ וַיָּבִ֣אוּ אֶל־דָּוִ֑יד וְלֹא־אָבָ֤ה דָוִיד֙ לִשְׁתּוֹתָ֔ם וַיְנַסֵּ֥ךְ אֹתָ֖ם לַיהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And these three broke through the midst of the camp of the Philistines, and drew water out of the cistern of Bethlehem, which was in the gate, and brought it to David to drink: and he would not drink of it, but rather offered it to the Lord,
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin ne kolme juoksivat Philistealaisten leiriin, ja ammunsivat vettä kaivosta Betlehemin portin tyköä, ottivat ja kantoivat Davidille; mutta ei David tahtonut sitä juoda, vaan kaasi sen Herran eteen,
verses.king_james: And the three brake through the host of the Philistines, and drew water out of the well of Beth–lehem, that was by the gate, and took it, and brought it to David: but David would not drink of it, but poured it out to the Lord,

verses.latin_vulgate: dicens : Absit ut in conspectu Dei mei hoc faciam, et sanguinem istorum virorum bibam : quia in periculo animarum suarum attulerunt mihi aquam. Et ob hanc causam noluit bibere : hæc fecerunt tres robustissimi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֡אמֶר חָלִ֩ילָה֩ לִּ֨י מֵאֱלֹהַ֜י מֵעֲשׂ֣וֹת זֹ֗את הֲדַ֣ם הָאֲנָשִׁים֩ הָאֵ֨לֶּה אֶשְׁתֶּ֤ה בְנַפְשׁוֹתָם֙ כִּ֣י בְנַפְשׁוֹתָ֣ם הֱבִיא֔וּם וְלֹ֥א אָבָ֖ה לִשְׁתּוֹתָ֑ם אֵ֣לֶּה עָשׂ֔וּ שְׁלֹ֖שֶׁת הַגִּבּוֹרִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: Saying: God forbid that I should do this in the sight of my God, and should drink the blood of these men: for with the danger of their lives they have brought me the water. And therefore he would not drink. These things did the three most valiant.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja sanoi: Jumala antakoon sen kaukana olla minusta, että minä tämän tekisin! pitäiskö minun juoman näiden miesten verta heidän henkensä vaarassa? sillä he ovat sen tuoneet henkensä vaaralla; sentähden ei hän tahtonut sitä juoda. Sen tekivät ne kolme sankaria.
verses.king_james: And said, My God forbid it me, that I should do this thing: shall I drink the blood of these men that have put their lives in jeopardy? for with the jeopardy of their lives they brought it. Therefore he would not drink it. These things did these three mightiest.

verses.latin_vulgate: Abisai quoque frater Joab ipse erat princeps trium, et ipse levavit hastam suam contra trecentos vulneratos, et ipse erat inter tres nominatissimus,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאַבְשַׁ֣י אֲחִֽי־יוֹאָ֗ב ה֤וּא הָיָה֙ רֹ֣אשׁ הַשְּׁלוֹשָׁ֔ה וְהוּא֙ עוֹרֵ֣ר אֶת־חֲנִית֔וֹ עַל־שְׁלֹ֥שׁ מֵא֖וֹת חָלָ֑ל (ולא) [וְלוֹ־]שֵׁ֖ם בַּשְּׁלוֹשָֽׁה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Abisai the brother of Joab, he was chief of three, and he lifted up his spear against three hundred whom he slew, and he was renowned among the three,
verses.finnish_biblia: Abisai Joabin veli, hän oli ylimmäinen kolmesta, ja hän nosti keihäänsä ja löi kolmesataa, ja hän ylistettiin niiden kolmen seassa.
verses.king_james: And Abishai the brother of Joab, he was chief of the three: for lifting up his spear against three hundred, he slew them, and had a name among the three.

verses.latin_vulgate: et inter tres secundos inclytus, et princeps eorum : verumtamen usque ad tres primos non pervenerat.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מִן־הַשְּׁלוֹשָׁ֤ה בַשְּׁנַ֙יִם֙ נִכְבָּ֔ד וַיְהִ֥י לָהֶ֖ם לְשָׂ֑ר וְעַד־הַשְּׁלוֹשָׁ֖ה לֹא־בָֽא׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And illustrious among the second three, and their captain: but yet he attained not to the first three.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hän oli kolmen seassa kuuluisampi kahta ja oli heidän päämiehensä; mutta kolmen tykö ei hän tullut.
verses.king_james: Of the three, he was more honourable than the two; for he was their captain: howbeit he attained not to the first three.

verses.latin_vulgate: Banaias filius Jojadæ viri robustissimi, qui multa opera perpetrarat, de Cabseel : ipse percussit duos ariel Moab, et ipse descendit et interfecit leonem in media cisterna tempore nivis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנָיָ֨ה בֶן־יְהוֹיָדָ֧ע בֶּן־אִֽישׁ־חַ֛יִל רַב־פְּעָלִ֖ים מִֽן־קַבְצְאֵ֑ל ה֣וּא הִכָּ֗ה אֵ֣ת שְׁנֵ֤י אֲרִיאֵל֙ מוֹאָ֔ב וְ֠ה֠וּא יָרַ֞ד וְהִכָּ֧ה אֶֽת־הָאֲרִ֛י בְּת֥וֹךְ הַבּ֖וֹר בְּי֥וֹם הַשָּֽׁלֶג׃
verses.douay_rheims: Banaias the son of Joiada a most valiant man, of Cabseel, who had done many acts: he slew the two ariels of Moab: and he went down, and killed a lion in the midst of a pit in the time of snow.
verses.finnish_biblia: Benaja Jojadan poika väkevän miehen poika, joka suuria töitä tehnyt oli, Kabtseelista: hän löi kaksi Moabilaisten jalopeuraa; ja hän meni alas ja löi jalopeuran keskellä kaivoa lumen aikana.
verses.king_james: Benaiah the son of Jehoiada, the son of a valiant man of Kabzeel, who had done many acts; he slew two lionlike men of Moab: also he went down and slew a lion in a pit in a snowy day.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et ipse percussit virum ægyptium, cujus statura erat quinque cubitorum, et habebat lanceam ut liciatorium texentium : descendit igitur ad eum cum virga, et rapuit hastam quam tenebat manu, et interfecit eum hasta sua.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהֽוּא־הִכָּה֩ אֶת־הָאִ֨ישׁ הַמִּצְרִ֜י אִ֥ישׁ מִדָּ֣ה ׀ חָמֵ֣שׁ בָּאַמָּ֗ה וּבְיַ֨ד הַמִּצְרִ֤י חֲנִית֙ כִּמְנ֣וֹר אֹֽרְגִ֔ים וַיֵּ֥רֶד אֵלָ֖יו בַּשָּׁ֑בֶט וַיִּגְזֹ֤ל אֶֽת־הַחֲנִית֙ מִיַּ֣ד הַמִּצְרִ֔י וַיַּהַרְגֵ֖הוּ בַּחֲנִיתֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he slew an Egyptian, whose stature was of five cubits, and who had a spear like a weaver's beam: and he went down to him with a staff, and plucked away the spear, that he held in his hand, and slew him with his own spear.
verses.finnish_biblia: Hän löi myös Egyptin miehen, joka oli viisi kyynärää pitkä, ja Egyptiläisen kädessä oli keihäs niinkuin kankaan puu, mutta hän meni alas hänen tykönsä sauvalla, tempasi keihään Egyptiläisen kädestä ja tappoi hänen omalla keihäällänsä.
verses.king_james: And he slew an Egyptian, a man of great stature, five cubits high; and in the Egyptian’s hand was a spear like a weaver’s beam; and he went down to him with a staff, and plucked the spear out of the Egyptian’s hand, and slew him with his own spear.

verses.latin_vulgate: Hæc fecit Banaias filius Jojadæ, qui erat inter tres robustos nominatissimus,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֵ֣לֶּה עָשָׂ֔ה בְּנָיָ֖הוּ בֶּן־יְהוֹיָדָ֑ע וְלוֹ־שֵׁ֖ם בִּשְׁלוֹשָׁ֥ה הַגִּבֹּרִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: These things did Banaias the son of Joiada, who was renowned among the three valiant ones,
verses.finnish_biblia: Näitä teki Benaja Jojadan poika; ja hän ylistettiin kolmen uljasten seassa,
verses.king_james: These things did Benaiah the son of Jehoiada, and had the name among the three mighties.

verses.latin_vulgate: inter triginta primus, verumtamen ad tres usque non pervenerat : posuit autem eum David ad auriculam suam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מִן־הַשְּׁלוֹשִׁ֗ים הִנּ֤וֹ נִכְבָּד֙ ה֔וּא וְאֶל־הַשְּׁלֹשָׁ֖ה לֹא־בָ֑א וַיְשִׂימֵ֥הוּ דָוִ֖יד עַל־מִשְׁמַעְתּֽוֹ׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And the first among the thirty, but yet to the three he attained not: and David made him of his council.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja oli kuuluisampi niitä kolmeakymmentä; mutta kolmen tykö ei hän tullut. Ja David teki hänen salaiseksi neuvonantajaksensa.
verses.king_james: Behold, he was honourable among the thirty, but attained not to the first three: and David set him over his guard.

verses.latin_vulgate: Porro fortissimi viri in exercitu, Asahel frater Joab, et Elchanan filius patrui ejus de Bethlehem,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְגִבּוֹרֵ֖י הַחֲיָלִ֑ים עֲשָׂהאֵל֙ אֲחִ֣י יוֹאָ֔ב {ס} אֶלְחָנָ֥ן בֶּן־דּוֹד֖וֹ מִבֵּ֥ית לָֽחֶם׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Moreover the most valiant men of the army, were Asahel brother of Joab, and Elchanan the son of his uncle of Bethlehem,
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin myös sotasankarit: Asahel Joabin veli, Elhanan Dodonin poika Betlehemistä,
verses.king_james: Also the valiant men of the armies were, Asahel the brother of Joab, Elhanan the son of Dodo of Beth–lehem,

verses.latin_vulgate: Sammoth Arorites, Helles Pharonites,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שַׁמּוֹת֙ הַהֲרוֹרִ֔י {ס} חֶ֖לֶץ הַפְּלוֹנִֽי׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Sammoth an Arorite, Helles a Phalonite,
verses.finnish_biblia: Samot Harorilainen, Heles Pelonilainen,
verses.king_james: Shammoth the Harorite, Helez the Pelonite,

verses.latin_vulgate: Ira filius Acces Thecuites, Abiezer Anathothites,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עִירָ֤א בֶן־עִקֵּשׁ֙ הַתְּקוֹעִ֔י {ס} אֲבִיעֶ֖זֶר הָעַנְּתוֹתִֽי׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Ira the son of Acces a Thecuite, Abiezer an Anathothite,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ira Ikeksen Tekoalaisen poika, Abieser Antotilainen.
verses.king_james: Ira the son of Ikkesh the Tekoite, Abi–ezer the Antothite,

verses.latin_vulgate: Sobbochai Husathites, Ilai Ahohites,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: סִבְּכַי֙ הַחֻ֣שָׁתִ֔י {ס} עִילַ֖י הָאֲחוֹחִֽי׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Sobbochai a Husathite, Ilai an Ahohite,
verses.finnish_biblia: Sibbekai Husatilainen, Ilai Ahohilainen,
verses.king_james: Sibbecai the Hushathite, Ilai the Ahohite,

verses.latin_vulgate: Maharai Netophathites, Heled filius Baana Netophathites,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מַהְרַי֙ הַנְּטֹ֣פָתִ֔י {ס} חֵ֥לֶד בֶּֽן־בַּעֲנָ֖ה הַנְּטוֹפָתִֽי׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Maharai a Netophathite, Heled the son of Baana a Netophathite,
verses.finnish_biblia: Maherai Netophatilainen, Heled Baenan Netophatilaisen poika,
verses.king_james: Maharai the Netophathite, Heled the son of Baanah the Netophathite,

verses.latin_vulgate: Ethai filius Ribai de Gabaath filiorum Benjamin, Banaia Pharatonites,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אִיתַ֣י בֶּן־רִיבַ֗י מִגִּבְעַת֙ בְּנֵ֣י בִנְיָמִ֔ן {ס} בְּנָיָ֖ה הַפִּרְעָתֹנִֽי׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Ethai the son of Ribai of Gabaath of the sons of Benjamin, Banai a Pharathonite,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ittai Ribain poika Gibeasta, BenJaminin lapsista, Benaja Pirtagonilainen,
verses.king_james: Ithai the son of Ribai of Gibeah, that pertained to the children of Benjamin, Benaiah the Pirathonite,

verses.latin_vulgate: Hurai de torrente Gaas, Abiel Arbathites, Azmoth Bauramites, Eliaba Salabonites.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: חוּרַי֙ מִנַּ֣חֲלֵי גָ֔עַשׁ {ס} אֲבִיאֵ֖ל הָעַרְבָתִֽי׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Hurai of the torrent Gaas, Abiel an Arbathite, Azmoth a Bauramite, Eliaba a Salabonite,
verses.finnish_biblia: Hurai Gasin pojista, Abiel Arbatilainen,
verses.king_james: Hurai of the brooks of Gaash, Abiel the Arbathite,

verses.latin_vulgate: Filii Assem Gezonites, Jonathan filius Sage Ararites,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עַזְמָ֙וֶת֙ הַבַּ֣חֲרוּמִ֔י {ס} אֶלְיַחְבָּ֖א הַשַּׁעַלְבֹנִֽי׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: The sons of Assem a Gezonite, Jonathan the son of Sage an Ararite,
verses.finnish_biblia: Asmavet Baharumilainen, Eliahba Saalbonilainen;
verses.king_james: Azmaveth the Baharumite, Eliahba the Shaalbonite,

verses.latin_vulgate: Ahiam filius Sachar Ararites,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּנֵ֗י הָשֵׁם֙ הַגִּ֣זוֹנִ֔י {ס} יוֹנָתָ֥ן בֶּן־שָׁגֵ֖ה הַהֲרָרִֽי׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Ahiam the son of Sachar an Ararite,
verses.finnish_biblia: Hasemin Gisonilaisen lapset: Jonatan Sagen Hararilaisen poika,
verses.king_james: The sons of Hashem the Gizonite, Jonathan the son of Shage the Hararite,

verses.latin_vulgate: Eliphal filius Ur,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֲחִיאָ֧ם בֶּן־שָׂכָ֛ר הַהֲרָרִ֖י {ס} אֱלִיפַ֥ל בֶּן־אֽוּר׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Eliphal the son of Ur,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ahiam Sakarin Hararilaisen poika, Eliphal Urin poika,
verses.king_james: Ahiam the son of Sacar the Hararite, Eliphal the son of Ur,

verses.latin_vulgate: Hepher Mecherathites, Ahia Phelonites,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: חֵ֚פֶר הַמְּכֵ֣רָתִ֔י אֲחִיָּ֖ה הַפְּלֹנִֽי׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Hepher a Mecherathite, Ahia a Phelonite,
verses.finnish_biblia: Hepher Makeratilainen, Ahia Pelonilainen,
verses.king_james: Hepher the Mecherathite, Ahijah the Pelonite,

verses.latin_vulgate: Hesro Carmelites, Naarai filius Asbai,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: חֶצְרוֹ֙ הַֽכַּרְמְלִ֔י {ס} נַעֲרַ֖י בֶּן־אֶזְבָּֽי׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Hesro a Carmelite, Naarai the son of Azbai,
verses.finnish_biblia: Hetsro Karmelilainen, Naerai Asbain poika,
verses.king_james: Hezro the Carmelite, Naarai the son of Ezbai,

verses.latin_vulgate: Joël frater Nathan, Mibahar filius Agarai,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יוֹאֵל֙ אֲחִ֣י נָתָ֔ן {ס} מִבְחָ֖ר בֶּן־הַגְרִֽי׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Joel the brother of Nathan, Mibahar the son of Agarai.
verses.finnish_biblia: Joel Natanin veli, Mibhar Hagrin poika,
verses.king_james: Joel the brother of Nathan, Mibhar the son of Haggeri,

verses.latin_vulgate: Selec Ammonites, Naharai Berothites armiger Joab filii Sarviæ,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: צֶ֖לֶק הָעַמּוֹנִ֑י נַחְרַי֙ הַבֵּ֣רֹתִ֔י נֹשֵׂ֕א כְּלֵ֖י יוֹאָ֥ב בֶּן־צְרוּיָֽה׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Selec an Ammonite, Naharai a Berothite, the armourbearer of Joab the son of Sarvia.
verses.finnish_biblia: Zelek Ammonilainen, Naherai Berotilainen, Joabin Zerujan pojan aseenkantaja,
verses.king_james: Zelek the Ammonite, Naharai the Berothite, the armourbearer of Joab the son of Zeruiah,

verses.latin_vulgate: Ira Jethræus, Gareb Jethræus,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עִירָא֙ הַיִּתְרִ֔י {ס} גָּרֵ֖ב הַיִּתְרִֽי׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Ira a Jethrite, Gareb a Jethrite,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ira Jetriläinen, Gareb Jetriläinen,
verses.king_james: Ira the Ithrite, Gareb the Ithrite,

verses.latin_vulgate: Urias Hethæus, Zabad filius Oholi,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֽוּרִיָּה֙ הַחִתִּ֔י {ס} זָבָ֖ד בֶּן־אַחְלָֽי׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Urias a Hethite, Zabad the son of Oholi,
verses.finnish_biblia: Uria Hetiläinen, Sabad Ahelain poika,
verses.king_james: Uriah the Hittite, Zabad the son of Ahlai,

verses.latin_vulgate: Adina filius Siza Rubenites princeps Rubenitarum, et cum eo triginta :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עֲדִינָ֨א בֶן־שִׁיזָ֜א הָראוּבֵנִ֗י רֹ֛אשׁ לָראוּבֵנִ֖י וְעָלָ֥יו שְׁלֹשִֽׁים׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Adina the son of Siza a Rubenite the prince of the Rubenites, and thirty with him:
verses.finnish_biblia: Adina Sisan Rubenilaisen poika, Rubenilaisten päämies, ja kolmekymmentä oli hänen kanssansa;
verses.king_james: Adina the son of Shiza the Reubenite, a captain of the Reubenites, and thirty with him,

verses.latin_vulgate: Hanan filius Maacha, et Josaphat Mathanites,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: חָנָן֙ בֶּֽן־מַעֲכָ֔ה וְיוֹשָׁפָ֖ט הַמִּתְנִֽי׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Hanan the son of Maacha, and Josaphat a Mathanite,
verses.finnish_biblia: Hanan Maekan poika, Josaphat Mitniläinen,
verses.king_james: Hanan the son of Maachah, and Joshaphat the Mithnite,

verses.latin_vulgate: Ozia Astarothites, Samma, et Jehiel filii Hotham Arorites,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עֻזִּיָּ֖א הָעַשְׁתְּרָתִ֑י {ס} שָׁמָע֙ (ויעואל) [וִיעִיאֵ֔ל] בְּנֵ֖י חוֹתָ֥ם הָעֲרֹעֵרִֽי׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Ozia an Astarothite, Samma, and Jehiel the sons of Hotham an Arorite,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ussia Asteratilainen, Sama ja Jeiel Hotamin Aroerilaisen pojat,
verses.king_james: Uzzia the Ashterathite, Shama and Jehiel the sons of Hothan the Aroerite,

verses.latin_vulgate: Jedihel filius Samri, et Joha frater ejus Thosaites,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יְדִֽיעֲאֵל֙ בֶּן־שִׁמְרִ֔י וְיֹחָ֥א אָחִ֖יו הַתִּיצִֽי׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Jedihel the son of Zamri, and Joha his brother a Thosaite,
verses.finnish_biblia: Jediael Simrin poika, Joha hänen veljensä, Titsiläinen,
verses.king_james: Jediael the son of Shimri, and Joha his brother, the Tizite,

verses.latin_vulgate: Eliel Mahumites, et Jeribai, et Josaia filii Elnaëm, et Jethma Moabites, Eliel, et Obed, et Jasiel de Masobia.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֱלִיאֵל֙ הַֽמַּחֲוִ֔ים וִירִיבַ֥י וְיוֹשַׁוְיָ֖ה בְּנֵ֣י אֶלְנָ֑עַם {ס} וְיִתְמָ֖ה הַמּוֹאָבִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: Eliel a Mahumite, and Jeribai, and Josaia the sons of Elnaim, and Jethma a Moabite, Eliel, and Obed, and Jasiel of Masobia.
verses.finnish_biblia: Eliel Maheavilainen, Jeribai ja Josavia Elnaamin pojat, Itma Moabilainen,
verses.king_james: Eliel the Mahavite, and Jeribai, and Joshaviah, the sons of Elnaam, and Ithmah the Moabite,

verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֱלִיאֵ֣ל וְעוֹבֵ֔ד {ס} וְיַעֲשִׂיאֵ֖ל הַמְּצֹבָיָֽה׃ {פ}
verses.finnish_biblia: Eliel, Obed ja Jaesiel Mesobajasta.
verses.king_james: Eliel, and Obed, and Jasiel the Mesobaite.
